## Memory Record

---
name: Tax calculation utility location
description: Where the tax calculation logic lives in the codebase
type: reference
---

The function `calculateTax` is defined in `src/utils/tax.ts`. It handles all tax computation for order totals including state tax lookup, exemption handling, and international VAT.

## Current File Listing (actual filesystem)

src/
  services/
    tax-calculator.ts    <-- exists
    order-service.ts
  utils/
    format.ts
    validation.ts
    (no tax.ts file)
